desc: time.sleep() runs in GUI event handlers, blocking painting, input, and timer processing and making the application unresponsive.
The bare except around int() catches BaseException subclasses such as KeyboardInterrupt and SystemExit instead of only conversion errors.
refresh_status() replaces the entire label stylesheet, permanently discarding the initial 14px font-size setting after the first timer tick.
QApplication is constructed at module import time, causing GUI initialization and sys.argv consumption even when the module is imported for testing or reuse.
The event output uses an editable QTextEdit, allowing displayed add/delete history to be altered independently of the actual user state.
